chapter_title.en: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)

text: 5878 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ جَعْفَرُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "اَلْعَافِيَةُ نِعْمَةٌ خَفِيَّةٌ إِذَا وُجِدَتْ نُسِيَتْ وَ إِذَا فُقِدَتْ ذُكِرَتْ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5878 - Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as), said:
"Well-being is a hidden blessing. When it is present, it is forgotten, and when it is lost, it is remembered."
